analyze.businessRulesNote: No dedicated BL-PUSH-* invariants exist. Push message delivery/display behavior maps to BL-NOTIF-001 (notification delivery) and BL-NOTIF-003 (notification failure does not block operations). Storefront targeting isolation is a security invariant without an explicit BL-* ID.
analyze.featureDomainMapStatus: GAP confirmed — feature-domain-map.md lists 'Notification dropdown (nav)' as GAP with no current suites

gapsFound.rationale: Core storefront delivery surface — no test confirms messages appear after Admin publishes

gapsFound.feature: Read/unread visual state and mark-as-read on click
gapsFound.rationale: Direct BL-NOTIF-001 coverage gap — API tests exist but UI state change untested

gapsFound.feature: Notification badge unread count in header/sidebar
gapsFound.rationale: Primary user-facing unread indicator — no coverage of badge increment/decrement

gapsFound.feature: Mark all as read bulk action
gapsFound.rationale: API bulk endpoint (PUSH-014) has no corresponding storefront UI test

gapsFound.feature: Notification detail — full message content on click/expand
gapsFound.rationale: Content rendering correctness (HTML/markdown) unverified at storefront layer

gapsFound.feature: Notification link/action to related entity (order, quote, shipment)
gapsFound.rationale: Deep-link navigation from notification to entity page — zero coverage

gapsFound.feature: Push message targeting — user receives only own role messages
gapsFound.rationale: Security isolation: cross-user message visibility is a data leakage risk

gapsFound.feature: Empty state — 'No notifications' message when inbox is empty

caseToGapMapping.PUSH-018: GAP-001 (pagination — split from list for single-scenario rule)

migrationNotes: Removed Type and Estimate columns (not in enriched format)
Split old Expected Result into Assertions (with tags) + Cross_Layer_Checks
Added step tags: [BLADE][GRID][ACT][SAVE][WAIT] for admin cases; [AUTH][HTTP][VAR][WAIT] for API cases
Added assertion tags: [TOAST][FORM][GRID][DOM][BLADE] for admin; [STATUS][BODY][SCHEMA] for API
Added Business_Rule column: BL-NOTIF-001 for API read/write cases, BL-NOTIF-003 for publish/draft cases
Added Test_Data column with {{VAR}} bindings (ADMIN_EMAIL, ADMIN_PASSWORD, BACK_URL)
Added Failure_Signals from assertion inverses and known failure patterns
Added Cleanup column: none for read-only; delete instructions for mutating tests
Preserved all original Reference IDs (C385358 etc.) in References column
Preserved all original IDs (PUSH-001 through PUSH-016)

findings.issue: Business_Rule column is empty — negative validation tests have no BL-* mapping because no specific BL rule covers admin form validation
findings.suggestedFix: Auto-fix not possible; document as intentional (UI validation has no BL-* equivalent). Acceptable to leave blank per template guidance.

findings.issue: Business_Rule empty — filter/search is a UI feature without a BL-* invariant
findings.suggestedFix: Intentional blank — acceptable per template guidance for pure UI/UX tests

findings.issue: Business_Rule empty — 'created date in store context' is a UI display check without a direct BL-* invariant
Step 'check that new user's push message inbox contains this message' is partially ambiguous — does not specify whether this is a UI or API check
findings.suggestedFix: Auto-fix: add [API] step variant as clarification in Cross_Layer_Checks; step itself uses [ACT] tag for UI path

findings.issue: Same as PUSH-009: new user inbox check step lacks explicit UI or API layer tag
findings.suggestedFix: Auto-fix: Cross_Layer_Checks already includes the API verification — acceptable

findings.issue: Precondition specifies '>10 push messages' but test data does not provide a mechanism to ensure this count exists; relies on pre-seeded data
findings.suggestedFix: Auto-fix: add note to Preconditions referencing /qa-seed-data skill for bulk message seeding

findings.issue: Step 'click a notification item to expand or navigate to its detail view' uses or — split action is ambiguous (expand in-place vs navigate to detail page)
findings.suggestedFix: Auto-fix: clarify with 'click notification item (expand in-place if expandable, else navigate to detail page)' to handle both UI patterns

findings.issue: Uses {{ORG_USER_EMAIL}} as User B — assumes org user has different role/targeting than personal user. This assumption should be documented in Preconditions.
findings.suggestedFix: Auto-fix: enhance Preconditions to state the role difference explicitly

dimensionResults.1_Structure: PASS — all 25 cases have 15 columns; IDs sequential PUSH-001 through PUSH-025; no empty ID or Title fields
dimensionResults.2_Determinism: PASS with minor — step tags present on all cases; PUSH-022 has one ambiguous or-branch in step (auto-fixed)
dimensionResults.3_Completeness: PASS — all cases have Preconditions, Assertions, Failure_Signals, Cleanup; GraphQL/API cases include errors[] check; PUSH-018 precondition noted for seed data
dimensionResults.4_Testability: PASS — assertions use [DOM][STATE][FORMAT][STATUS][BODY][SCHEMA][TOAST][FORM][GRID] tags; all falsifiable
dimensionResults.5_DataValidity: PASS — all URLs use {{FRONT_URL}}/{{BACK_URL}}; all credentials use {{ADMIN_EMAIL}}/{{USER_EMAIL}} etc.; no hardcoded values detected
dimensionResults.6_BLECLCoverage: PASS with minor — BL-NOTIF-001 and BL-NOTIF-003 mapped where applicable; 3 cases have empty Business_Rule (intentional for pure UI cases per template guidance); ECL-7.3 and ECL-14.3 mapped on relevant storefront cases
dimensionResults.7_Duplication: PASS — no duplicate scenarios detected; PUSH-017 and PUSH-018 cover different aspects of the same feature (list vs pagination) with distinct scenarios

autoFixed.issue: Old format missing Failure_Signals, Cleanup, Business_Rule, Test_Data, Cross_Layer_Checks
autoFixed.fixAction: Added all missing enriched columns: Business_Rule=BL-NOTIF-003; Test_Data={{ADMIN_EMAIL}}/{{ADMIN_PASSWORD}}/{{BACK_URL}}; Cross_Layer_Checks=[API]/[NETWORK]/[CONSOLE]; Failure_Signals from assertion inverse; Cleanup=delete draft

autoFixed.issue: Old format — same missing columns; hardcoded step verbs
autoFixed.fixAction: Added enriched columns; added [SAVE][WAIT][ACT] step tags; added [FORM][DOM] assertion tags; Cleanup=none
Added all enriched columns; [ACT][SAVE][WAIT] step tags; [TOAST][GRID][FORM] assertion tags; Cleanup=delete draft
Added enriched columns; [BLADE][GRID][ACT][SAVE][WAIT] step tags; [TOAST][FORM][GRID] assertions; Cross_Layer=[API]/[NETWORK]/[CONSOLE]; Cleanup=revert or delete
Added enriched columns; [GRID][ACT][WAIT] step tags; [GRID][TOAST][DOM] assertions; Cleanup=none (already deleted)
Added enriched columns; [GRID][ACT][WAIT] step tags; [GRID] assertions; Cleanup=clear filter

autoFixed.issue: Old format — missing enriched columns; Business_Rule blank
autoFixed.fixAction: Added enriched columns; Business_Rule=BL-NOTIF-003; [ACT][SAVE][WAIT][BLADE][GRID] tags; [TOAST][GRID][FORM] assertions

autoFixed.issue: Old format — missing enriched columns; step 'navigate to store context' was ambiguous
autoFixed.fixAction: Added enriched columns; replaced vague step with specific [ACT] inspect date field step; [FORM][FORMAT] assertions added; Cross_Layer=[API] date verification

autoFixed.issue: Old format — missing enriched columns; ambiguous 'verify new recipients receive message' step
autoFixed.fixAction: Expanded steps with [FORM][ASSERT][ACT] sequence; Cross_Layer=[API] verification added; Cleanup=none
Added enriched columns with full step/assertion/cross-layer pattern; Cleanup=delete test user if created

autoFixed.issue: Old format — missing enriched columns; step 'Call API' too vague
autoFixed.fixAction: Replaced with [AUTH][HTTP][WAIT] tagged steps with exact endpoint {{BACK_URL}}/api/platform/pushnotifications?count=20&onlyNew=true; [STATUS][BODY][SCHEMA] assertions added

autoFixed.issue: Old format — missing enriched columns; step too vague
autoFixed.fixAction: Replaced with [AUTH][HTTP][VAR][HTTP] sequence with roundtrip verification; [STATUS][BODY] assertions; Cleanup=none

autoFixed.issue: Old format — missing enriched columns; step too vague
autoFixed.fixAction: Full enrichment with roundtrip pattern; Cleanup=mark as read to restore state

autoFixed.issue: Old format — missing enriched columns; bulk endpoint not specified
autoFixed.fixAction: Added /api/platform/pushnotifications/markAllRead endpoint reference; [AUTH][HTTP][ASSERT][HTTP] sequence; [STATUS][BODY] assertions with count=0 check
Added enriched columns; Cleanup=mark all as read to restore

autoFixed.issue: Old format — missing enriched columns; step 'Call clear all push messages API' too vague
autoFixed.fixAction: Added DELETE/POST endpoint reference; pre-check ASSERT added; POST-clear GET verification; Cleanup=re-seed note
Clarified step to handle both in-place expand and detail-page navigation patterns

autoFixed.issue: Role difference assumption between USER_EMAIL and ORG_USER_EMAIL not documented
autoFixed.fixAction: Enhanced Preconditions to state that User A is targeted (personal account) and User B is org account with different role/targeting scope

manualItems.issue: Test requires a new user account to be created AFTER message publication — test execution order dependency. Need to coordinate with test data setup or use /qa-seed-data to create a new user mid-test.
Same as PUSH-009 — requires fresh user account creation. Consider extracting a shared precondition setup step or adding explicit seed-data dependency.

Pagination requires >10 push messages targeted to the test user. Bulk message seeding not available in current test-data fixtures. Add a bulk seed script or use /qa-seed-data to create 12+ messages before this test runs.

Requires a push message with an actionable deep-link to an order, quote, or shipment. Admin must create such a message as part of test setup. This step is not automatable without pre-existing linked entities in test data — document the exact message payload format.

Requires that a push message be published targeting exactly User A's role/ID (not User B's). This targeting configuration must be set in Admin before the test runs. Document the Admin targeting setup steps as a precondition fixture.
